programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: As Bull prepares for fatherhood, his work at TAC suffers without his top attorney Benny, who quit in reaction to Bull's romantic reconnection to Isabella; the team must mount a defense for a young bartender on trial for involuntary manslaughter.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A charismatic entrepreneur is accused of defrauding investors in her seemingly groundbreaking water filtration company; Bull focuses on selecting jurors whose belief systems allow them to see his client as a dreamer who never meant criminal intent.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Benny's previous career with the district attorney's office comes into focus when Chunk aims to get a new trial for a man he believes was wrongfully convicted of triple homicide by a prosecution team that included Benny.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull helps a famous social media influencer take her father to court to overturn his legal guardianship over her empire, which he was granted after the young mogul suffered a public mental breakdown.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Taylor becomes personally invested in having Bull help a dancer bring a civil suit against a real estate mogul who assaulted her at a gentlemen's club when the district attorney's office refuses to pursue criminal charges.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A woman who has a reputation for aggressive behavior is on trial for her husband's murder, but she claims to have no memory of it due to an alcohol-induced blackout.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull faces the seemingly impossible task of defending a client who already confessed to accidentally killing the doctor he blames for his mother's death.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma (Uma Thurman), a radio host, is about to be married to Richard (Colin Firth), her perfect match. But right before her wedding, she learns she's already married to Patrick (Jeffrey Dean Morgan), a charming but irresponsible fireman. Furthermore, Patrick has a secret: he has arranged this little trick because Emma advised Patrick's ex-fiancee to end their relationship. However, Patrick may find that the trick is on him, for he soon begins to fall in love with his uptight adversary.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon (Robert De Niro) who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side-effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Senior Moment
programme.desc: A retired NASA test pilot learns to navigate love and life again. Starring William Shatner and Jean Smart.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: When Sara (Elizabeth Hurley) is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe (Matthew Perry), that sets them off on a wild trip across the country.

programme.title: Two For the Money
programme.desc: Brandon Lang loves football: an injury keeps him from the pros.

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang for participating

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: World leaders targeted at London funeral; only one bodyguard can stop it.

programme.title: Cowboy Up
programme.desc: Two brothers compete for women and success in the professional rodeo bull riding circuit.

programme.title: Crazy In Alabama
programme.desc: An abused wife heads to Hollywood to become a TV star while her nephew back in Alabama witnesses a racially motivated murder.

programme.title: Blind Date
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars as a young public-relations executive who goes on a remarkable and disastrous blind date with Kim Bassinger. Complications abound leading to involvement with both the police and the underworld. Directed by Blake Edwards.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Abby Richter is a romantically challenged morning show producer whose search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick. (Edited for TV)

programme.title: Divorce American Style
programme.desc: About a nouveau-riche Los Angeles couple who, after 17 years of marriage, decide to call it quits.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Girl
programme.desc: A scatterbrained door-to-door cosmetics saleswoman and her bumbling file clerk fiancé become prime suspects in a murder.

programme.title: Theodora Goes Wild
programme.desc: Riotous comedy and zany romance fuel this story of a small-town girl (Irene Dunne) who writes a racy best-selling novel and falls in love with the New York sophisticate (Melvyn Douglas) who illustrates it. A fine supporting cast keeps this film rolling along splendidly.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes To Town
programme.desc: A reluctant millionaire (Gary Cooper) is declared insane when he announces that he ll give his fortune away to America s poor. Oscar winning direction by Frank Capra.

programme.title: City of Industry
programme.desc: A retired thief swears revenge on the lunatic who murdered his brother and partner, while going on the run with the loot they stole.

programme.title: A Walk In The Woods
programme.desc: After spending two decades in England, Bill Bryson (Robert Redford) returns to the U.S., where he decides the best way to connect with his homeland is to hike the Appalachian Trail with one of his oldest friends, Stephen Katz (Nick Nolte).

programme.title: Whale Rider
programme.desc: A contemporary story of love, rejection and triumph as a young Maori girl fights to fulfill a destiny her grandfather refuses to recognize.

programme.title: Affliction
programme.desc: A deeply troubled small-town cop investigates a suspicious hunting death while other events jeopardize his sanity.

programme.title: Southpaw
programme.desc: Boxer Billy Hope turns to a retired fighter to help him turn his life around for one last epic fight.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: Kurt must learn the ancient kick boxing art of Muay Thai in order to avenge his brother.

programme.title: Man of Tai Chi
programme.desc: A young martial artist's unparalleled Tai Chi skills land him in a highly lucrative underworld fight club.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school, where he becomes caught up in the underground fight scene.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: The Mob
programme.desc: The clash between the rising Longde Chamber of Commerce and the entrenched Tongmingtang. As old and new orders collide, fierce family feuds erupt, igniting intense battles on the Shanghai Bund.

programme.title: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A crime syndicate places a hit on a billionaire's daughter, making her the target of an elite assassin squad. A band of down-and-out mercenaries protects her, fighting tooth and nail to stop the assassins from reaching their target.

programme.title: A Janitor
programme.desc: Fukumi is a high school janitor whose father was a gangster. He works at the school as a janitor instead of belonging to the gang so he can watch out for Yui, the daughter of his deceased father's brother Majima Yoshiki.

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: A fearless martial-arts master seeks revenge for the murder of his wife.

programme.title: The Golden Cane Warrior
programme.desc: When an aging martial arts master chooses two of her meeker students to be her successors, two older students steal her mystical cane and pursue their rivals.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: WWJD? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: WWJD continues as the drifter arrives into a new town , inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: The Love Advisor
programme.desc: An assistant secretly writing love advice for her boss risks her career for a handsome journalist.

programme.title: What Comes Around
programme.desc: A woman's past comes back to haunt her when the pimp she helped put behind bars is released and after revenge.

programme.title: Truth
programme.desc: Reporter's murder unites her college friend and former professor in a quest to uncover the killer's identity.

programme.title: Rift
programme.desc: Sr. Special Agent Jason Cole is a man of principles and integrity. With a thriving career, a loving wife, and a reputation for hard work, he seems to have it all. But when his past resurfaces, it forces him into an impossible situation. As time runs out, he must decide: will he do the right thing, even if it costs him everything? The stakes are higher than ever imagined.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: James must move in with his girlfriend of three months after being evicted from his place, and soon he discovers that he doesn't want to be with her anymore. His hope is to get her to break up with him but still let him sleep on the couch.

programme.title: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Mike tries to get out of the drug trade to save his little sister, Angel, and leaves her with John (Cuba Gooding Jr.), an undercover cop. Mike is killed, and the drug lords kidnap Angel, forcing John to use all of his skills to save the innocent girl.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc across the streets, and it's up to hardened detective James Womack (Pam Grier) and her partner Dupree (Robert Patrick) to put an end to organized crime - even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Just Can't Leave You Alone
programme.desc: When a blind date ends in a shootout, Krystal Gray is left with more questions than answers. She discovers a flash drive linked to the murder and a web of secrets involving her brother, a dirty cop, and a mysterious man named Jarrell. As she uncovers the truth, Krystal becomes the target in a deadly game where love and betrayal blur and everyone has a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Game of Cards
programme.desc: When data analyst Nicole Tucker’s car is broken into and a mysterious military-issued card tied to her family legacy is stolen, she’s thrust into a dangerous game of betrayal. Her search for the truth uncovers a chilling connection between the theft and her boyfriend Michael, forcing Nicole to confront dark secrets, deadly allies, and a past that refuses to stay buried.

programme.title: For You I Will
programme.desc: Mikayla is a struggling hopeless romantic. When she meets Jalen, she thinks she’s found the one, but he wants a possession over a partner. He demands her loyalty by asking her for a hit list of all of her ex-boyfriends to secure his love. Will she walk away? Or let her desperation consume her and fall into a deadly trap?

When the remains of an apartheid-era policeman are discovered 60 years after he went missing, a retired singer revisits her past to help with the investigation. But how much does she know, and what is she holding back?

programme.title: Don Dada
programme.desc: Desperate to survive a brutal Chicago winter, Rah Jah and Tee Tee hustle for food and shelter in the streets. When a botched deal lands him in the hands of powerful crime bosses, he rises to the top of the hierarchy at a deadly cost.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: Meteor Moon
programme.desc: When a meteor crashes into the moon and shifts its axis, Earth’s gravity pulls it into the path of the planet.

programme.title: Martian Land
programme.desc: When a Martian outpost is destroyed by a storm, a neighboring community must find a way to stop it.

programme.title: Jungle Run
programme.desc: A search for their missing father turns deadly when siblings are viciously attacked by jungle animals.

programme.title: Dracula: The Original Living Vampire
programme.desc: Det. Amelia Van Helsing hunts a killer of young women. All evidence leads to the untouchable Count Dracula.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Searching for a transmitter to contact Kaya at Northern Lights, Our Heroes discover an abandoned TV NEWS STATION.

programme.title: Hell House LLC 3: Lake of Fire (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Set one year after the events of HELL HOUSE LLC 2, the Abaddon Hotel is on the verge of being torn down. It is purchased by billionaire Russell Wynn as the new home for his popular interactive show, Insomnia. He invites Vanessa Sheppard and her film crew to record everything leading up to the performance. They encounter a nefarious plot - one that threatens to unleash a veritable hell on earth.

programme.title: The Innkeepers (Edited Version)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees -Claire (Sara Paxton) and Luke (Pat Healy)- are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels. As the Inns final days draw near, odd guests check in as the pair of minimum wage ghost hunters begin to experience strange and alarming events that may ultimately cause them to be mere footnotes in the hotels long unexplained history.

programme.title: Heavy Trip
programme.desc: In this offbeat comedy from Finland, Turo is stuck in a small village where the best thing in his life is being the lead vocalist for the amateur metal band Impaled Rektum. The only problem? He and his bandmates have practiced for over a decade without playing a single gig. The guys get a surprise visitor from Norwaythe promoter for a huge heavy metal music festivaland decide its now or never. They steal a van, a corpse, and even a new drummer in order to make their dreams a reality.

programme.title: The Beyond (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The seven dreaded gateways to hell are concealed in seven cursed places... And on the day the gates of hell are opened, the dead will walk the earth!From legendary Italian horror master Lucio Fulci come the ultimate classic of supernatural terror. A remote and cursed hotel, built over one of the seven gateways, becomes a yawning malevolent abyss that begins devouring both the bodies and the souls of all who enter in a graphic frenzy of gory crucifixions, chunkblowing chain-whippings, eyeball impalements, sulfuric acid meltdowns, flesh-eating tarantulas, throat-shredding demon dogs and ravenous bloodthirsty zombies. THE BEYOND is a towering achievement in hair-raising, mind-bending cinematic terror!

programme.title: 13 Nights of Elvira
programme.desc: Elvira sets off for the far off future, and 1985, in this high tech chase for the minds of killers!

programme.title: #Horror
programme.desc: Based on a horrifying true story, a group of prep-school girls experience a deadly night of terror when a vicious online game turns bloody. Chloë Sevigny & Timothy Hutton star.

programme.title: One Cut of the Dead
programme.desc: One Cut of the Dead

programme.title: Warning: Do Not Play
programme.desc: An aspiring director hunts down a film said to be shot... by a ghost. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL.

programme.title: Inner Demons
programme.desc: A reality show crew descends upon the home of a young girl struggling with drug addiction and uncover instead a terrifying case of demonic possession in this haunting thriller.

programme.title: The Devil's Doorway
programme.desc: In 1960, two priests are sent to investigate a miracle in an Irish home for unwed mothers only to discover that one of the residents is possessed by the devil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.desc: Two brothers on a quest to find their long-lost, kidnapped sister, who now lives as part of an Indian tribe.

programme.title: Utah Blaine

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Disaster strikes when Roy Rogers's beloved horse Trigger is stolen and held for ransom money. Will Roy find $100,000 to get his faithful companion back, or will he find a way to trap the gang holding the horse hostage? Along with Roy and Trigger, you'll find Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher, and young Michael Chapin as Ted Carver, a gallant boy who helps reunite Roy with the smartest horse in show business!

programme.title: Lawless Frontier
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western about a man avenging the murder of his parents. Other cast members include frequent Wayne sidekick George 'Gabby Hayes', plus Yakima Canutt, Sheila Terry, and Jack Rockwell. This Paul Malvern Production from director Robert N. Bradbury also features Earl Dwire, one of the great B-movie villains, as Zanti, the ruthless bandit who sets the action in motion.

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: John Wayne plays a man wrongly convicted of murder in this exciting western drama from Lone Star Pictures. You'll enjoy plenty of gun action and thundering hoofbeats as he escapes from jail and then joins a gang, hoping to find the real killer! Director Armand Schaefer (The Miracle Rider, The Lost Jungle) whips up some fine performances from a cast of B-movie favorites, including Lane Chandler (Samson and Delilah) and the great stunt rider, Yakima Canutt. And of course, the film features plenty of fight scenes, made memorable by John Wayne's big swinging' right fist! For film buffs: This was one of 11 films Wayne starred in that year, making 1933 one of the busiest years of Wayne's legendary career.

programme.title: Hell Town
programme.desc: In Hell Town (aka Born to the West) John Wayne is back in the saddle as two-fisted Dare Rudd, a roaming cowhand trying to prove he can win a woman's love and outwit a crooked saloon owner. This exciting B-movie from Paramount Pictures was based on a novel by western writer Zane Grey. With a wild and wooly cast that includes Johnny Mack Brown, Marsha Hunt, Monte Blue, and Lucian Littlefield, director Charles Barton (Abbott and Costello Meet Frankenstein) gives us a tale of romance, action, and high stakes gambling!

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An unholy alliance! Marking the feature film debut of one of Hollywoods most influential and widely referenced auteur directors, Sam Peckinpah, The Deadly Companions centers on a redemptive journey to escort a funeral procession through dangerous Indian Territory. Featuring fine work from a top-notch cast that includes the inimitable Maureen OHara at the height of her illustrious career, Peckinpahs first foray into film provides a promising glance into the energetic and violent nature of his iconic later works.

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: Randolph Scott plays James Barlow, an agent from Chicago hired to bring the notorious Reno brothers to justice. But wouldnt you know it? The Reno gang includes a beautiful young woman (Mala Powers), who catches Barlows eye. This western from director Tim Whelan (The Thief of Bagdad) features cinematography by two-time Oscar winner Ray Rennahan (Gone With The Wind), while the screenplay was by noted author Horace McCoy (They Shoot Horses, Dont They?). Theres also an all-star cast, including Forrest Tucker, J. Carrol Naish, Edgar Buchanan, Denver Pyle, and several other shaggy sidewinders!

programme.title: This Renault Espace has an 800bhp F1 V10 engine!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie travels to the Matra museum in France to dig out one of the most extreme builds ever undertaken by a manufacturer, the Espace F1. Made especially famous via Gran Turismo, this Renault was built by the Williams F1 team in the ‚Äò90s as a showcase for the Renault 3.5-litre V10 engine, which was inserted bang in the middle of the car. With zero suspension to speak of, this people carrier was apparently very sketchy to drive around corners, but was savagely quick in a straight line. We dive into the nerdiest parts of its engineering and suss out how on Earth the ‚Äò90s engineers managed to make this vehicle work.

programme.title: We Converted Our £2,000 Estate Cars into Campers!
programme.desc: After buying cheap estate cars, Mike and Maxwell have been tasked by Richard Hammond to convert them into cheap campers, the ultimate petrolhead 'sleepers'. With each car graded on set-up time, entertainment and sleep score, will the mighty BMW 330 or the plucky SAAB 9-5 take the victory?

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Installs £25,000 POWER Mods to her £1,500 Hot Hatch!
programme.desc: In today’s video, Maxwell and Izzy are back at Alliance Racing to modify the Mini Cooper S with top-of-the-line, NAPA-approved parts. At the end of the day, we see just how much power the mods have added to the supercharged Mini.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Takes His Daughter Off-Roading In His NEW Twin Turbo Daily!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has a new daily ‚Äì it has two turbos, all-wheel drive and a truck bed... Taking the place of the DriveTribe Ram TRX, Izzy Hammond is brought in to sign off this new addition to the garage, hopefully be given the thumbs up as Richard's new daily driver.

programme.title: Richard Hammond FINALLY Drives the Ferrari Purosangue ��� And He Hates It
programme.desc: This test has been coming for a long time ��� Richard Hammond driving the 715bhp Ferrari Purosangue, their first ever go at an SUV. 6.5-litre V12, four seats, all-wheel drive, what's not to like? Quite a lot, apparently...

programme.title: Ben Collins Finally Sets a Lap Record!
programme.desc: Mike and Ben head to the northernmost race circuit in the UK ��� Knockhill ��� to set the EV lap record. Using MG's latest performance cars through the Cyberster and 4 X-Power, the lads head out on track to make history!

programme.title: Richard Hammond ROASTS James May's Pub
programme.desc: For the first time since he bought the Royal Oak, James May has invited Richard Hammond for a tour of his pub.

programme.title: We Took These Legendary 2000s Cars On A 400-mile Road Trip!
programme.desc: Ben and Mike are heading on a road trip to celebrate the 2000s ��� driving cars from the 2000s, music from the 2000s, and of course, talking Top Gear from the 2000s. Travelling from where Ben lived in that decade, to where I lived, we'll stop off at relevant points along the way, as well as ending up at one of the most haunting locations in Top Gear history ��� RAF Elvington, the site of Richard Hammond's life-threatening 300mph crash.

programme.title: Ben Collins Attempts the Impossible Climb
programme.desc: Ben Collins’ farm has an impossible hill that apparently no normal vehicle can ascend. The ex-Stig lines up three off-roading vehicles to try and defeat this muddy challenge, and one of them doesn't even have any wheels...

programme.title: Why BMW Hates V6 Engines
programme.desc: BMW has never made one of the most obvious engine layouts, the versatile V6. Mike dives into the engineering of a V6 versus a straight-six, and why BMW has always opted for the latter.

programme.title: When Audi Put a 6.0 litre, 500bhp, V12 Diesel in a Q7
programme.desc: Mike Fernie dives into the crazy diesel technology pioneered by Audi Sport in the mid-2000s. Using twin turbo V12 diesel power on track, they then turned to putting the same configuration in a road car, creating the 6.0-litre V12 diesel Audi Q7 V12 TDI.

programme.title: How Nissan Made 1000 BHP Look Easy
programme.desc: The RB26 engine has been done to death, but the R35���s V6 hasn���t really been deep-dived despite its performance credentials. Mike Fernie pours over the anatomy of an R35 GT-R���s V6, picking through the engineering of each main component and laying out why it���s an engine that can be tuned incredibly easily.

programme.title: We Found the Lost 40kg, 400bhp Nissan Engine! (It's INCREDIBLE)
programme.desc: Mike Fernie goes full journalist and tracks down Nissan���s insane 40kg, 400bhp engine. Situated at racecar builders RML, Mike gets up close and personal to the tiny engine block, interviewing the RML engineers about how they developed the 3-cylinder turbo engine.

programme.title: Giving Our £1 Engine the Restoration It Deserved!
programme.desc: Earlier this year, we saved a legendary straight-six engine from a scrapyard. We paid one pound for it. And it was in BAD shape. We literally forklifted it out of a hedge, transported it to Jaguar specialist Tom Lenthall’s, and stripped it down to see just how bad things were after years sitting outside in the elements. By the end of today’s video, the engine will be rebuilt, and totally transformed

programme.title: I Drove the Most Terrifying Car on Sale (1000 HP V12!)
programme.desc: After blowing up car internet last year through our geeky TVR Cerbera Speed 12 video, Mike has been invited to actually drive one of these beasts. Sporting a 6.0-litre twin turbo V12 that generates up to 1000bhp, this will easily be the scariest car Mike has ever driven.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought His ULTIMATE Estate Car!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has bought a new car! It's an estate, it'll fit into his car collection perfectly, and he's very proud of it...

programme.title: This is how Porsche's new SIX-STROKE engine works!
programme.desc: Every car engine, bar a few two-stroke outliers, have used the four-stroke engine cycle which was created back in the 1800s. Porsche is looking to shake things up and has recently filed a patent for a unique six-stroke engine, somehow adding strokes into what has been the staple for over 150 years. Mike attempts to explain the fundamental physics behind this new engine cycle, and why Porsche might be using it in their sportscars of the future.

programme.title: Mike Fernie: How I Got The Job Presenting At DriveTribe
programme.desc: Mike Fernie sits down to cover the most popular question he gets asked – How did he become a presenter on the DriveTribe YouTube channel?

programme.title: We Blew Up James May's Maserati
programme.desc: Richard‚Äôs DB9 was saved, Jeremy‚Äôs F-Type was saved. And today we complete the trinity, and it doesn‚Äôt go well‚Ä¶ James May's Maserati is in a BAD way!

programme.title: Why A Bugatti Veyron Oil Change Costs £20,000!
programme.desc: Mike opens the doors to Simon Furlonger Cars, the main dealer in the UK for servicing a Bugatti Veyron. He takes part in one customer’s annual service (one day of a five-day affair), discovering what makes a Veyron service so savage.

programme.title: We Found Richard Hammond's Perfect Project Car In This Scrapyard!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie discovers an absolute treasure trove of Volvos just outside London, and decides to search for anything badged with the coveted 'R' badge. Can he find a legendary turbo Volvo in this breakers yard?

programme.title: We���ve Bought A Cheap (And Incredibly Rare) Six-Cylinder BMW!
programme.desc: DriveTribe has set themselves a challenge ��� starting with a 100bhp car and a ��500 budget, can they trade their way up to the holy grail of 500hp? Through simple fixes, sponsor parts and ingenuity, can they go from a low-power shed to a supercar-rivalling beast? In this second episode, Mike uses the ��1900 from the selling of car number 1 to step up the ladder from a Ford KA to a BMW Z3. Using parts and some influencer help, the Z3 will be fixed and modified to then go up for sale and take things to the next level.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Drives A Supercar For The First Time!
programme.desc: Having built up her driving experience in multiple DriveTribe videos, it���s time for Izzy to experience the cutting edge of automotive performance. Around DriveTribe���s favourite track in South Wales, Izzy gets to grips with a car that will push her abilities to the limit ��� the near-700bhp McLaren Artura

programme.title: Richard Hammond Takes His Driving Test Again!
programme.desc: Despite being arguably the most famous car presenter ever, we take Richard Hammond back to the start and put him through a legitimate UK driving test, to see whether he can get through without a single minor or major issue. To make things a bit spicier, Izzy Hammond will also be taking the test two, igniting a fiery father-daughter battle to see who is the best driver in the Hammond family.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: Buckle up, Baltimore! The Arena Championship Series East is taking over the CFG Bank Arena for a night of pure, unadulterated horsepower. This isn't just a show; it's a high-stakes battle where 12,000-pound behemoths defy gravity and legendary rivalries—like father versus son and brother versus brother—push every driver to the absolute edge.

programme.title: World Finals

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.desc: Arena Championship Series East heads to MVP Arena in Albany, New York as Weston Anderson looks to keep the series points lead with Grave Digger. Will he take the overall event championship or will Jurassic Attack’s Dalton Widner or Scooby-Doo’s Linsey Read rise to the occasion.

programme.title: Primetime

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane intensity as Round 6 of Monster Jam Fast Track takes over the iconic AT&T Stadium in Arlington, Texas. Watch as 12 world-class athletes, including icons like Tristan England in JCB Digatron and Adam Anderson in Grave Digger, push their 12,000-pound machines to the limit across three grueling competitions. The stakes are higher than ever in the JCB Racing bracket, where mechanical drama—like smoke pouring from Mike Pagliarulo’s Excalibur—threatens to derail championship dreams. From the technical precision of the Skills Challenge to the gravity-defying backflips of Freestyle, the "Home of the Dallas Cowboys" provides the ultimate stage for raw power and fearless rivalries.

programme.title: Monster Jam Fast Track
programme.desc: Experience the high-octane energy of the rodeo capital of the world as Monster Jam Fast Track hits NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas. In Round 5 of the Stadium Championship Series West, the world's most elite drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit across three grueling competitions: JCB Racing, the technical Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle. Rivalries reach a boiling point as Ryan Anderson and Tyler Menninga battle for the series points lead, while rising stars like Dalton Widner in Shell Shocked stun the crowd with gravity-defying maneuvers. From the precision of the racing brackets to the chaotic brilliance of freestyle, witness a night of shattered limits and historic performances that culminates in a surprising overall event championship for Bryce Kenny and Tech Deck Wreck Deck.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam has been operating under the assumption that his three children are little angels, but when his wife decides to rejoin the workforce after being a stay-at-home mom for 13 years, and he starts taking on more of the parenting responsibilities, he's quickly disavowed of that notion. Kate, a preteen, is a master manipulator and excited to take advantage of her father's naivete; Teddy spends too much time with his hands down his pants; and Emme frets over school. After recovering from the initial shock -- and with the advice of equally stressed parents Marie and Lowell -- Adam is confident he can lay down the law and keep the house in order.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: In this adaptation of a long-running British comedy series, Jamie, an unemployed photographer, can't figure out why he has so little luck with the ladies, and he doesn't get much insight from his roomie, Kevin, a manager at a security systems company. Kevin's girlfriend, Sarah, is a levelheaded nurse who sees the best in Kevin despite his chauvnistic ways, while Cherie is the hottie next door who is pursued by both Jamie and Kevin. Jamie later gets a new roommate, Steve, whose girlfriend, Katie, is an art teacher with a secret wild side.

Kevin's girlfriend, Sarah, is a levelheaded nurse who sees the best in Kevin despite his chauvnistic ways, while Cherie is the hottie next door who is pursued by both Jamie and Kevin. Jamie later gets a new roommate, Steve, whose girlfriend, Katie, is an art teacher with a secret wild side.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "The History Behind Mister Jiu's and Debate Club: Dumplings vs. Noodles with Brandon Jew" - Chef Brandon Jew and Chris Ying join Dave at the Super Bowl to talk about Brandon's entry in the Toyota Tailgate Challenge, MSG, a debate between dumplings and noodles and har gao vs. shengjianbao and the historic significance of the location of his restaurant, Mister Jiu's.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show - ‘Chapter One’ with Bobby Flay - Dave and Chris sit down with Bobby Flay to discuss his new book ‘Chapter One,’ his impact on the culinary world, their experiences with cooking on television, and running restaurants in New York. Dave also shares his latest predictions on what we will see next in dining.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show - Family Feud 'VIP Access Pass' with Mina Kimes and Pablo Torre - Dave and Chris are joined by Mina Kimes and Pablo Torre to recap their experience on ‘Family Feud’. Also in this episode, Dave and Chris share six ways in which data analytics and science impact dining.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show - Entrepreneurship with Warby Parker Co-Founder Neil Blumenthal - On this episode, Dave offers up six things you would need when starting a new business. Then, they chat with friend Neil Blumenthal, Co-Founder and Co-CEO of Warby Parker, all about his journey to starting his company, the market for glasses for Asian men with wide faces, the future of AI in retail, and more.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show - Heston Blumenthal, AI’s Impact on Food, & A Sichuan Food Love Note - Dave and Chris share their admiration for Chef Heston Blumenthal in a new segment, "So You Say There's A Chance", before jumping into a DADs meets Predictions conversation during which they share their thoughts on AI’s potential impact on food and what they hope their kids will grow to learn. Finally, Dave shares a piece of advice: eat more Sichuan food now!

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show: Convenience Store Snacks, Steak in the Matrix, and Chopsticks - Dave recounts his recent visit to a convenience store trade show before he and Chris jump into a new segment: Culinary Cameo. This episode, they break down Cypher and Agent Smith's steak dinner scene in The Matrix. Then, the duo begins to unpack the world of chopsticks, including the evolution of chopstick usage and shapes along with possible innovations to eating utensils.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: The Dave Chang Show: TV Food Styling with Courtney McBroom - Dave and Chris connect with their old friend Courtney McBroom as she shares her journey from the culinary world to becoming a food consultant for the television series 'Lessons in Chemistry.' She explains the challenges of food styling, the importance of authenticity in food presentation, and the unique experience of working on a film set compared to in a restaurant. The trio reflects on the evolution of culinary careers, the vibrant New York food scene, and Courtney's aspirations for future projects.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: For the indigenous Rarámuri people, long-distance running through Chihuahua's majestic Copper Canyon is a way of life. Pati meets the Moreno brothers, who are famous for winning ultramarathons. In Huetosachi, community leader María Monarca teaches Pati about the art of cooking with corn in Rarámuri cuisine, from nixtamalization to a traditional dish known as "chacales."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Chihuahua's capital, Chihuahua City, Pati meets the first member of the Rarámuri people to become a world-famous pianist, Romeyno Gutiérrez, who teaches her the basics of Rarámuri music before taking her to his favorite barbacoa spot. Pati's also invited into the home of Chef Ana Rosa Beltrán del Río to cook a few ancient Chihuahuan recipes and learn the art of drying chiles.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati journeys to Casas Grandes to experience the preserved foods, or "conservas," that sustained people during the Mexican Revolution. She meets a family that has lived for generations at Hacienda de San Diego, Mexico's "White House" for a day after the battle of Casas Grandes, including Diana Acosta and her mother, Sara Ramírez, who still preserves food the way they did during the war.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati saddles up for an exhilarating ride into the heart of Chihuahua's ranch and rodeo life. She gets a lesson in roping and riding from rodeo champion Ricardo "Bubba" Nevárez and his friends, then is invited to a post practice carne asada. She also meets Chihuahua's most influential cattle rancher, Álvaro Bustillos, at his Rancho El Arroyo, where the ranch cook serves up some cowboy delicacies.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Casas Grandes, Pati rides in style with local art curator Mayte Luján in her 1960s Cadillac. Mayte owns a bed and breakfast, Las Guacamayas, where she invites Pati into the kitchen to make chile con queso in impossibly soft flour tortillas. Later, Pati learns about another tasty export from Chihuahua, pecans, at Gustavo Vázquez's farm, where his family has been growing them for generations.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Mata Ortiz, a village known for its exquisite pottery, and learns its history from local potter Tavo Silveira, who is known worldwide and even made a piece for the pope. Then Pati gets her hands dirty with talented duo Laura Bugarini and Héctor Gallegos, who teach her the basics of Mata Ortiz pottery. Turns out, Tavo can also cook and makes an asado de puerco feast in the town square.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the culture of mysterious Mennonites, a religious community who came to Chihuahua from Germany. Mostly, she's after what they're best known for around Mexico, their cheese! She sees their traditional cheese-making process at Pampas Cheese Factory, the holder of the Guinness World Record for largest Mennonite cheese. Then she tries another local culinary innovation, Mennonite pizza.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In one of Chihuahua's most remote areas, Guachochi, Pati shares a traditional Rarámuri meal with community leaders Alejandro Hernández and Margarita González, who advocate for land rights, political representation, and cultural preservation. At Kokoyome, a sustainable ranch in the Sinforosa Canyon, she learns about organic farming practices in the region.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom share their favorite haunts in Los Angeles, including the famous Mel’s Diner in Santa Monica. They take a trip to Sonoma County for a farm-to-table adventure and get a rare opportunity to take a fascinating glimpse at the world’s most advanced lab-grown meat facility in Oakland.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom go on a Texas road trip, and absorb the very best of its Southern Hospitality. In Dallas they taste an array of delights offered at the State Fair of Texas. They learn about ranching and how to cook and eat like a real cowboy, and learn the secret behind Austin’s best BBQ.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores her Jewish roots with historian Mónica Unikel-Fasja, visiting historic sites in Mexico City. At Niddo, she cooks and reminisces with her sister, celebrating family, identity, and stories that shape a life.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Rústico in Cuauhtémoc for pastries with Iván and Germán Ortiz, then explores dreams and creativity at Casa Morgana in Roma with Kiren Miret. Tart, ice cream, and heartfelt stories celebrate passion and tradition.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Milpa Alta to harvest and char nopales with Chef Jorge Córcega, then joins Luis Alvarado’s family for their storied mole. Over a shared meal, they celebrate how tradition and flavor nourish the community.
